Welcome to the TuyaOpen FAQ. Here you'll find answers to common questions about IoT development, AIoT platforms, embedded systems, open source tools, and more.

Browse the sidebar to find topics you're interested in.
items.title: FAQ
items.summary: Frequently asked questions about IoT development, AIoT, embedded systems, open source platforms, and TuyaOpen.

items.content_html:
TuyaOpen is an open source IoT development platform that provides SDKs, tools, and cloud services for building intelligent connected devices.

What Can You Build With TuyaOpen?​

  • Smart home devices (lights, switches, sensors)
  • AI-powered edge devices (voice control, AI vision)
  • Industrial IoT solutions
  • Custom embedded applications

Supported Hardware​

TuyaOpen supports a wide range of hardware:

  • ESP32 series (ESP32-S3, ESP32-C3)
  • Tuya T5 AI Board
  • Arduino-compatible boards
  • And more...

Quick Start​

Head to Quick Start Guide to set up your first project.

Have more questions? Browse the FAQ for more answers.
items.title: What is TuyaOpen?
items.summary: Learn what TuyaOpen is — an open source IoT platform for building intelligent connected devices. Discover its core features, supported hardware, and how to get started.
